attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Query performance
attributes.description: Query samples and top queries from db.server.query_sample and db.server.top_query events.

params.markdown:
## [SQL Server OTel] Query performance

This dashboard analyzes query-level observability from SQL Server receiver events:
- Query sample counts and session distribution
- CPU time, logical reads, elapsed time
- Blocking sessions and wait types
- Top queries by resource consumption

query.esql:
FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.session_id, sqlserver.session_id) IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.session_id, sqlserver.session_id))

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.session_id, sqlserver.session_id) IS NOT NULL
| STATS unique_sessions = COUNT_DISTINCT(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.session_id, sqlserver.session_id))

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) > 0
| STATS blocked_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) > 0
| STATS blocked_count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time))
| EVAL avg_cpu_ms = avg_cpu * 1000

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time))
| EVAL avg_cpu_ms = avg_cpu * 1000

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_reads = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads))

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_reads = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads))

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.total_elapsed_time, sqlserver.total_elapsed_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50_elapsed = MEDIAN(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.total_elapsed_time, sqlserver.total_elapsed_time))
| EVAL p50_elapsed_ms = p50_elapsed * 1000

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.total_elapsed_time, sqlserver.total_elapsed_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS p50_elapsed = MEDIAN(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.total_elapsed_time, sqlserver.total_elapsed_time))
| EVAL p50_elapsed_ms = p50_elapsed * 1000

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.request_status, sqlserver.request_status) IS NOT NULL
| STATS status_count = COUNT(*) BY status = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.request_status, sqlserver.request_status)
| SORT status_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.request_status, sqlserver.request_status) IS NOT NULL
| STATS status_count = COUNT(*) BY status = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.request_status, sqlserver.request_status)
| SORT status_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type) != ""
| STATS wait_count = COUNT(*) BY wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type)
| SORT wait_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type) != ""
| STATS wait_count = COUNT(*) BY wait_type = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.wait_type, sqlserver.wait_type)
| SORT wait_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace) IS NOT NULL
| STATS query_count = COUNT(*) BY db = COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace)
| SORT query_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace) IS NOT NULL
| STATS query_count = COUNT(*) BY db = COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace)
| SORT query_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time)), p95_cpu = PERCENTILE(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time), 95.0) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL avg_cpu_ms = avg_cpu * 1000, p95_cpu_ms = p95_cpu * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time)), p95_cpu = PERCENTILE(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time), 95.0) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL avg_cpu_ms = avg_cpu * 1000, p95_cpu_ms = p95_cpu * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_reads = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads) IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_reads = AVG(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Top queries by CPU time (query hash)

query.esql:
FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time)), total_reads = SUM(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads)), query_count = COUNT(*) BY query_hash = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.query_hash, sqlserver.query_hash), db = COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace, "unknown")
| SORT total_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time) IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.cpu_time, sqlserver.cpu_time)), total_reads = SUM(COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.logical_reads, sqlserver.logical_reads)), query_count = COUNT(*) BY query_hash = COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.query_hash, sqlserver.query_hash), db = COALESCE(attributes.db.namespace, db.namespace, "unknown")
| SORT total_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) > 0
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.sqlserver.blocking_session_id, sqlserver.blocking_session_id) > 0
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 50
